title: Changeset config
description: Configuration for changerig / @changesets, read from .changeset/config.json (or a "changeset" key in a release/shiprig file).

baseBranch.description: The branch releases are cut from (default "main").

ignore.description: Package names (exact or '*' globs) never released, tagged, or published.

fixed.description: Groups of packages that always version together at the same number.

linked.description: Groups of packages whose versions are linked but bump independently.

updateInternalDependencies.description: How far dependents of a changed package are bumped (default "patch").

versionStrategy.description: How a shared version is written: "lockstep" (default) moves every inheritor together; "independent" writes an inline version per package.

format.description: Changelog formatter: false | a name string (e.g. "native", "prettier") | an argv array for a custom formatter command.

changelog.description: Changelog generator: false, a string name, or a [name, options] tuple.

commit.description: Whether to auto-commit: false, true, or a [resolver, options] tuple.

changelogGroups.description: Maps conventional-commit types to a changelog section and implied bump; empty falls back to built-in defaults.

paths.description: Repo-relative roots (globs allowed) to narrow package discovery; empty scans the whole repo.

contributors.description: Configures the trailing "❤️ Contributors" changelog section.

enabled.description: Turns the section on (off by default).

excludeBots.description: Drops authors whose login/name looks like a bot (default true).

exclude.description: Author logins, names, or emails to omit (glob '*' supported).

issues.description: Configures the release `issues` step (commenting on / closing resolved issues).

enabled.description: Turns the step on; false is a no-op.

comment.description: Comment body template; {{version}} expands to released versions.

close.description: Closes issues referenced with a closing keyword.

release.description: Cross-tool key carrying the shiprig pipeline config in a unified file (see shiprig.json).

versioning.description: Selects where release intent comes from (changesets, commits, or both).

source.description: "changesets" (default) reads on-disk changeset files; "commits" synthesizes from conventional commits; "both" unions them.

scopes.description: Maps a conventional-commit scope to a package name for attribution.

initialRelease.description: Tunes a package's first release (no prior tag) under commit-based versioning.

collapse.description: Condenses the whole history into one changelog line.

bump.description: Bump for the collapsed first release (default "minor").

sourcePath.description: Narrows this ecosystem's discovery to a repo-relative root.

packageSource.description: Overrides the publish feed/registry for this ecosystem.

auth.description: Registry credential as a secret ref: "op://…", "env:NAME", or "cmd:…".

oidc.description: Trusted publishing via CI OIDC identity: "auto" (default) or "off".

user.description: Registry account/subject some OIDC exchanges require (e.g. NuGet).

versionStrategy.description: Overrides the top-level versionStrategy for this ecosystem.

env.description: Maps build-tool env vars to secret refs.
